name: Андрей

variables.body_type: athletic, broad shoulders, muscular chest, thick neck, strong build
variables.hair_color: short light blonde, evenly cropped, slight natural recession at temples
variables.clothing_signature: unbuttoned blue dress shirt, rolled-up sleeves, casual elegant

anatomic_anchor.face_shape: rounded oval broad, soft contours, broad forehead

eyes.color: bright blue with subtle gray undertones
eyes.eyebrows: straight to slightly arched, medium thickness, dark blonde, natural spacing above brow ridge

anatomic_anchor.nose: straight bridge with subtle width, rounded tip slightly turned down, no prominent hump
anatomic_anchor.lips: medium fullness, upper lip proportional to lower, natural pale pink tone, warm smile
anatomic_anchor.jaw: soft rounded, not square, gentle transition to neck, light stubble coverage
anatomic_anchor.skin_texture: fair smooth, fine texture, minimal visible pores, slight oily sheen on forehead, faint barely visible freckles on cheeks and nose bridge
distinguishing_features: short light blonde hair evenly cropped, receding slightly at temples, natural male pattern on sides
light stubble beard 2-3 days growth covering jawline, upper lip, chin
broad muscular shoulders with visible upper body strength
thick muscular neck with visible adam's apple
faint crow's feet at outer eye corners
age_indicators: horizontal forehead wrinkles visible when raising eyebrows
faint crow's feet at outer eye corners
firm neck skin with muscle definition
youthful skin elasticity with early maturity signs
anatomic_anchor.ears: medium-sized, close to head, well-defined helix
anatomic_anchor.neck: thick muscular, strong trapezius, visible adam's apple
anatomic_anchor.build: broad-shouldered athletic, muscular chest, visible upper body strength

visual_signature: athletic man in late 30s, rounded oval broad face, bright blue wide-set almond eyes, straight nose with rounded tip, short light blonde dense hair, thick muscular neck, broad shoulders, fair skin with faint freckles, light stubble, warm smile
